title: Tender British Cassaba Gratin
description: A delicate and flavorful British dish featuring poached cassaba, perfect for a crowd. This low-fat-friendly recipe is sure to please with its tender texture and floral notes.
instructions: In a large pot, combine the diced cassaba melon and enough water to cover it. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until tender.
Drain the cassaba and set it aside to cool.
In a blender or food processor, combine the cooled cassaba, low-fat cream, grated cheddar cheese, chopped fresh mint leaves, lemon juice, and honey. Blend until smooth.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Fold the egg whites into the cassaba mixture until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with whole wheat breadcrumbs.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
